articles.author: Lim Hui Jie
articles.title: Asia markets edge higher as oil prices dip after surging overnight on Middle East worries - CNBC
articles.description: Overnight, oil prices broke through the $80 per barrel mark, with Brent futures up 3.54% and last trading at $84.31.
articles.content:
Smoke rises from an Israeli strike targeting the southern suburbs on March 5, 2026 in Beirut, Lebanon.
